message:
feat(connectors): major expansion of AWS, Cloudflare, GCP, Supabase, Teams, and Vercel connectors

AWS: rustfmt chain formatting in client and connector.

Cloudflare: add is_secretless() to auth type, expand connector with
DNS record management, KV namespace operations, Pages project
deployment. Fix if-let chain formatting. Update manifest archetypes
and idempotency annotations.

GCP: expand connector with Compute Engine instance management,
Cloud Storage bucket operations. Rustfmt fixes.

Supabase: major expansion with RLS policy management, Edge Function
deployment, storage bucket operations, database migration support.
Update manifest with full operation declarations.

Teams: add thread reply, file attachment, channel management, and
adaptive card operations with full manifest declarations.

Vercel: comprehensive rewrite of client/connector/types/error for
V3 compliance with RetryLoop, ConnectorRuntime, typed operations,
and structured error mapping. Update manifest.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
